prompt: Write the opening of the community page — the first thing a new member reads.
method: constitution-bound live-chat simulation (same Nexus packs/contracts/DNA weighting; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)
reply:
Opening draft:

You don’t have to figure money out alone.

Here, faith-rooted women tell the truth — calmly, without shame — and belong before any tip. This is a house for safe money talk when traditional finance culture left you outside.

Come in quietly. You’re not late.

That’s the promise in one breath: confidence through trusted community, not alone. Reject hype slogans and tip-list openers that erase belonging-first identity.
